title: Recipe content snapshot future propagation
summary: owner/session-bound impact token으로 개인 레시피 PATCH, 미래 Meal content pin, shopping reconcile와 snapshot-v2 start/cancel/read를 common-lock transaction에 잠근다.
goal: preview한 exact draft와 Meal/claim target만 replace_all 또는 keep으로 원자 처리하고 v1/v2 dispatch를 dormant 배포해 historical/completed state와 rollback drain을 보존한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, design, authority, operations, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, backend/frontend implementation, security/DB review, five-axis review, design critic, product-design-authority, Stage 3/5/6 reviews and closeout; no session approves its own work

dependencies: recipe-snapshot-authority-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1078; runtime remains an implementation predecessor
personal-recipe-customization-write-core Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1080; runtime remains an implementation predecessor
cook-mode-whole-board is currently implementation and must merge before #7 implementation
cooked-batch-weight-ledger #8 owns exact-pantry completion and the R/R+1 compatibility gate before R+2 activation

external_smokes: merged-exact-SHA remote read-only preview session function ACL RLS policy constraint and capability inventory
two-owner preview and PATCH non-disclosure matrix with exact before-after domain digests
stale draft revision target and active-claim whole-transaction zero-write smoke
keep versus replace-all plus deterministic incomplete and completed-read-only shopping smoke
common writer lock order and multi-recipe UUID-order concurrency smoke
same-Meal planner start one-winner and cancel-restart idempotency smoke
legacy-v1 snapshot-v2 explicit dispatch and creation-off seeded-drain smoke
current and immediate-previous flag-off zero new personal-v2 write smoke
390px and 320px impact start dispatch visual-a11y-design evidence

verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of all five Stage 1 core artifacts plus roadmap and status projections
separate Codex security and DB review of token RLS ACL session generation common locks target claims shopping idempotency and dormant activation
separate Codex design critic of RECIPE_DETAIL impact PLANNER_WEEK start and COOK_MODE dispatch states
separate Codex screenshot-or-Figma product-design-authority review before Design Status confirmed
separate Codex Stage 3 Stage 5 Stage 6 and final closeout reviews

out_of_scope: Snapshot-v2 exact consumed pantry finished weight batch ledger cook count XP complete API and UI owned by #8
R and R+1 seeded full-drain acceptance and R+2 personal-v2 joint activation owned by #8 release gate
V1 required-key cutover new-start block or removal owned by #13 tombstone contract
Cooked batch meal log planner shell weight UI or meal-log UI owned by #8 through #12
Date-level target checkboxes extra shopping old-recipe new cooking partial PATCH or user restore endpoint
Past cook-done completed session completed shopping or meal-log repin
Direct nutrition pointer mutable recipe fallback or alternative snapshot authority
New public endpoint request response field status error code screen or client authority
Unmerged remote migration production database write or capability activation
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned and approval not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security/DB, five-axis and design reviews approve with zero required findings. Stage 1 verify_commands are current docs validators, focused workflow tests, lint, typecheck, audit and diff only. Runtime implementation waits for #4/#6 and cook-mode-whole-board. #7 owns dormant preview/PATCH propagation plus v2 start/cancel/read and explicit dispatch; #8 owns exact-pantry completion and the R/R+1 gate before R+2 joint activation. Design Status is temporary pending implementation evidence and authority approval.
